No Poverty.reason: No evidence in the course syllabus directly or indirectly relates to poverty eradication.

Zero Hunger.reason: No evidence in the course syllabus directly or indirectly relates to hunger or food security.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: Course topics include 'Body condition' and 'At the hospital', providing a minimal, indirect link to health awareness and services (Target 3.8).

Quality Education.reason: As a university course, it provides tertiary education (Target 4.3), skills for work (Target 4.4), and promotes cultural diversity and global citizenship (Target 4.7).

Gender Equality.reason: No evidence in the course syllabus directly or indirectly relates to gender equality.

Clean Water and Sanitation.reason: No evidence in the course syllabus directly or indirectly relates to clean water or sanitation.

Affordable and Clean Energy.reason: No evidence in the course syllabus directly or indirectly relates to affordable or clean energy.

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The course aims to cultivate language skills for 'work' and 'professional competitiveness,' directly supporting productive employment (Target 8.5).

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: No evidence in the course syllabus directly or indirectly relates to industry, innovation, or infrastructure.

Reduced Inequalities.reason: The course promotes an 'international perspective' and 'international mobility,' which can indirectly foster cross-cultural understanding and facilitate orderly mobility (Target 10.7).

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: No evidence in the course syllabus directly or indirectly relates to sustainable cities or communities.

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: The instruction to 'Respect Copyright' is a minimal, albeit tenuous, link to responsible consumption of intellectual property.

Climate Action.reason: No evidence in the course syllabus directly or indirectly relates to climate action.

Life Below Water.reason: No evidence in the course syllabus directly or indirectly relates to marine life or oceans.

Life on Land.reason: No evidence in the course syllabus directly or indirectly relates to terrestrial ecosystems or biodiversity.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: The explicit requirement to 'Respect Copyright' directly supports the rule of law regarding intellectual property (Target 16.3).

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: Developing an 'international perspective' and language skills builds human capacity for future international cooperation and knowledge sharing (Targets 17.6, 17.9).
